subject: masb-agent-devops
verdict: 18 original findings resolved — agent now passes all lenses with one minor determinism opportunity remaining.
summary: All findings from the previous analysis (grade: fair) have been applied. The shared pre-pass script (read-phase-state.py) eliminated the 3 determinism leaks. The check-status capability completes the capability set. First Breath now has pre-flight checks, CREED has complete standing orders, and sanctum templates are consistent. One minor opportunity remains: push branch name construction into the pre-pass script's JSON output. Grade improved from fair to good.

capabilities.name: check-status
capabilities.note: Inspecte l'état courant du repo et de la phase active

capabilities.name: create-branch
capabilities.note: Crée une branche via metadata du pre-pass script

capabilities.name: commit-phase
capabilities.note: Commit avec express path pour les opérations directes

capabilities.name: create-pr
capabilities.note: PR GitHub avec détection gh CLI

capabilities.name: merge-phase
capabilities.note: Merge avec délégation à validate-gate et cleanup post-merge

detailed_analysis.leanness: passes — no change from previous analysis
detailed_analysis.architecture: Clean topology, .agent-build/ memlog no longer in references/, prompt-quality-canon.md now referenced in SKILL.md
detailed_analysis.determinism: 3 prior leaks fixed; 1 low remaining (branch name construction in create-branch.md)
detailed_analysis.customization: name = "" now set, metadata-only surface correct for memory agent
detailed_analysis.sanctum-architecture: All 3 prior findings fixed — CAPABILITIES template exists, CREED has placeholder mission + complete standing orders
detailed_analysis.enhancement: All 7 prior findings fixed — pre-flight check, MASB degradation, health validation, express path, check-status, dormancy awareness
detailed_analysis.agent-cohesion: All 3 prior findings fixed — capability set complete, no gaps or redundancy

sanctum.note: Sanctum is the built agent's runtime memory, distinct from the builder's memlog in .agent-build/

journeys.name: First Breath
journeys.steps: Pre-flight (Git/gh check) → Scaffold (init-sanctum.py) → Greet → Domain discovery → Identity → Capabilities → Sanctum population → Birthday ceremony

journeys.name: Waking (normal session)
journeys.steps: Wake (wake.py loads sanctum + health check) → Become yourself → Bind standing rules → Greet with dormancy awareness → Execute requested capability → Capture memory

experience.headless: Wake supports --check for health validation; capability-level headless args not yet implemented

themes.title: Branch name construction still in prompt
themes.root_cause: create-branch.md asks the model to interpolate 'phase/{N}-{name}' from JSON fields when the pre-pass script could emit the branch_name directly.
themes.action: Add branch_name field to read-phase-state.py's JSON output and reference it in create-branch.md instead of constructing it in the prompt.

strengths: All capability prompts pass the leanness bar with no ceremony or defensive padding
Shared pre-pass script eliminates 3 determinism leaks with a single maintainable Python file
Capability set is now complete: inspect → branch → commit → PR → validate → merge → rollback covers the full DevOps lifecycle
CREED has domain-adapted standing orders with both universal defaults (surprise-and-delight, self-improvement) and specific Git rules
First Breath now validates Git/gh prerequisites before building identity
Memory-agent architecture remains sound — proper 4-step spine, sanctum is self-contained, wake.py validates integrity

recommendations.action: Add branch_name to read-phase-state.py's JSON output (f"phase/{phase_number}-{name}") and reference it directly in create-branch.md instead of having the model do string interpolation.

findings.title: Branch name construction is deterministic string operation in prompt
findings.evidence: Prompt constructs 'phase/{N}-{name}' from JSON fields instead of reading a pre-computed branch_name from the script's output.
findings.recommendation: Add branch_name to read-phase-state.py's JSON and have the prompt reference it directly.
